docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR, A LTD PARTNERSHIP AS TO DEFENDANT RIENZO, JAMES DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RIENZO, JAMES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT RIENZO, JAMES

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR, A LTD PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-16-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-22-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

2:50PM DEPT #1, JUDGE DIANE E. WICK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RESTITU- TION OF PREMISES LOCATED AT 240 JONES ST. LEASE IS FORFEITED. $528.00 FOR RENT AND DAMAGES, AND COSTS $105.00 TOTAL OF $633.00. EXECUTION STAY COMMENCING 10/1/93 OF $100.00 EACH MONTH. SHOULD DEFT FAILED TO COMPLY, STIPULATION WILL ENFORCE BY EX-PARTE APPLICA- TION FOR EVICTION WITHOUT NOTICE TO DEFENDANT. IF PLAINTIFF PAY IN TIMELY FASHION JUDGMENT WILL BE VA- CATED. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE STIPULATION JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIENZO, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 240 JONES STREET, #417, S.F. $528.00 RENT, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $633.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EXECUTION STAYED PENDING DEFT PAY $100.00 PER MONTH FROM OCT 1, 1993 UNTIL APR 1, 1994 ALONG WITH REGULAR RENT. SEE JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARLTON MANOR, A LTD PARTNERSHIP
